subject: Fermi  trigger No 663927396: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E.Gorbovskoy, K.Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov,

(Irkutsk State University, API),

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-IAC robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Spain (IAC Teide Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB220115.34 (trigger No 663927396,22h 32m 36.00s , +31d 22m 58.8s, R=31.32) errorbox  41121 sec after notice time and 41126 sec after trigger time at 2022-01-15 19:41:57 UT, with upper limit up to  18.8 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 24 deg. The sun  altitude  is -16.0 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -23 deg., longitude l = 92 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1850124

We obtain a following upper limits.

Filter C is a clear (unfiltred) band. 


The observation and reduction will continue. 
The message may be cited.
